title: Native NBD support
body:
### Feature request description

Not sure if it's in scope of `podman` but anyway but it would really nice if `podman` had native support for `NBD` (Network Block Device). Some host exposes block device over network `podman` connects to it and makes it available as a block device inside container. Could be quite useful for rootless containers.

### Suggest potential solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

comments.body:
Before opening PRs we should agree on designs.
First, I don't know how NBD works but if it creates devices then it will not be possible to use it rootless. Rootless users are not allowed to create devices.

If the block device is available on the host you could just mount it into the container with `--device` or `--volume`.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Since we have heard nothing back on this, closing.  Reopen if you still would like us to pursue this?
